'''''Meltdown on Hoth''''' was a children's book written by [[Jane Mason]] and illustrated by [[Chris Trevas]]. It tells a story set just before [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']], when [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] deal with a problem of heat in [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia's]] [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] quarters, as mentioned in the opening scenes of the film.
